events.text: Diagnosis written to `/app/answer.json`: the honeycomb is attributed to inadequate internal vibration during placement, marked as a **fail** with **high** risk since it can expose/undercover reinforcement and reduce durability/strength. Actions call for chipping back to sound concrete, inspecting rebar cover, repairing per ACI 301, and correcting vibration technique per ACI 304 going forward.
